_comment: MCP servers shipped with yasel-core. Trust tiers documented in docs/SECURITY.md. settings.json only auto-enables github + memory; the rest are per-session approval. JIRA is excluded by design (use Linear).

github._notes: Tier 1 — auto-enabled. Scope the GITHUB_TOKEN to least-privilege (read:repo + write:issues for the active repo only).

linear._notes: Tier 2 — per-session approval. Yasel's choice over JIRA.

slack._notes: Tier 2 — per-session approval. Reads channel data; can write messages — be careful.

postgres._notes: Tier 3 — read-only by default. Writes blocked by mcp-supervisor.sh unless MCP_POSTGRES_ALLOW_WRITES=1. Use a read-only DB role in DATABASE_URL.

sentry._notes: Tier 3 — read-only error data; per-session approval.
